Description: Verifies that the Jira analysis API endpoint functions correctly and calls the underlying service.
Verifies that the commit history mapping API endpoint behaves as expected.
Verifies the reviewer recommendation API returns the composite recommendations correctly.
Verifies that the ReviewerRecommender engine initializes properly with valid dependencies.
Ensures that the engine gracefully handles reviewer recommendations when an empty PR diff is provided.
Tests the datetime parsing logic for commits handling different date string formats robustly.
Validates the calculation of contributor statistics including additions/deletions and commit counts.
Verifies that the engine correctly caps or limits the number of commits processed per reviewer to maintain performance.
Checks the normalization of required reviewer data structures passed from Jira integration.
Tests the tokenization logic for file paths to build the proper multiset representations.
Validates the creation of a multiset derived from commit modifications.
Tests the extinguish logic that decays the relevance of older code modifications over time.
Verifies the creation of a reviewer profile without applying time decay (static profile).
Verifies the creation of a reviewer profile with time decay applied correctly to older commits.
Tests the calculation of Tversky similarity between PR multisets and reviewer profiles.
Tests the calculation of Jaccard similarity for computing overlapping expertise.
Validates the final scoring mathematical logic for a reviewer based on all similarity metrics.
Verifies the endpoint rejects requests missing the required username parameter.
Ensures the endpoint correctly handles an empty list of tickets gracefully.
Verifies the endpoint rejects requests missing the commits parameter.
Ensures the endpoint returns empty skills when provided an empty commit list.
Verifies the endpoint properly validates the structure of candidates and pr_data.
Tests the main recommender endpoint to ensure it instantiates the correct engine when required_reviewers is absent.
Tests the main recommender endpoint properly builds the required reviewer sub-engine.
Validates that the endpoint requires repository and pr parameters.
Tests the orchestrator endpoint maps users correctly and evaluates their profile via the engine.
Ensures the orchestrator can process an empty user list without crashing.
Verifies orchestrator request validation (missing required repo info).
